name: AltruistiqProductStructure
description: Structure documentation for an Altruistiq Product Structure (bill of materials) and its Inputs.

ProductStructure.description: A versioned bill of materials for a Product.

fields.name: string — structure label
fields.inputs: array<ProductStructureInput> — material and packaging line items

ProductStructureInput.description: A single material, packaging, or process line item in a Product Structure.

fields.type: string — input type (ingredient, packaging, energy, transport, process)
